title: Introducing Automations: always-on coding agents
summary: Cursor announced Automations, a feature for building always-on coding agents that execute on schedules or event triggers such as Slack messages, Linear issues, GitHub PRs, and PagerDuty incidents. The agents appear designed for continuous integration and incident response workflows.
